text: Dear Customer, Your account has been suspended. Click here to verify your identity immediately or your account will be permanently deleted within 24 hours.
Guaranteed 500% returns in just 30 days! Join our exclusive crypto trading group. Limited spots available. DM me now! Bitcoin only, no banks.
Microsoft Technical Support: We detected a virus on your computer. Call us immediately at 1-800-XXX-XXXX. Do not turn off your computer. Your personal data is at risk.
Congratulations! You have been selected as our lucky winner. You have won a brand new iPhone 15 Pro! To claim your prize, provide your credit card details for the $2 shipping fee.
My darling, I love you so much. I am stuck at the airport in Dubai and my wallet was stolen. Please send $500 via Western Union and I will pay you back double when I arrive.
Hi! I'm Lily, I accidentally texted the wrong number. You seem interesting, want to chat? I work in finance and have been making great returns on crypto lately. I can show you how.
IRS FINAL NOTICE: You owe $3,420 in back taxes. A warrant has been issued for your arrest. To avoid arrest call 1-888-XXX-XXXX within 1 hour and pay via gift cards.
CONFIDENTIAL: I am Barrister Johnson, attorney to late Mr. David Smith. He died without a will and left $15.5 million. You share his surname so you are the beneficiary. Reply urgently.
Your PayPal account has been limited. Please provide your Social Security Number, date of birth, and bank account number to restore full access at verify-paypal-secure.net
Your Amazon package could not be delivered. Update your shipping address and payment info at: amaz0n-delivery-update.com/tracking/verify
Sberbank: Vasha karta zablokirovana iz-za podozritelnoy aktivnosti. Dlya razblokirovki srochno pozvonite i soobshchite CVV kod i PIN.
Uvazhaemiy grazhdanin, FSB Rossii soobschaet: na vashe imya oformlen kredit moshennikov. Dlya otmeny perevedte dengi na bezopasniy schet nemedlenno. Nikomu ne soobschayte ob etom.
Investiruy v kriptu vmeste so mnoy! Garantirovannyy dokhod 300% v mesyats. Ya uzhe zarabotal 1 mln rubley. Tolko bitcoin, tolko hardkor. Pishi v lichku!
Vy vyigrali avtomobil BMW X5 v nashey aktsii! Dlya polucheniya priza vvedite nomer karty, srok deystviya i CVV na nashem sayte bmw-prize-ru.com v techenie 24 chasov.
Privet, ty takoy interesnyy chelovek. Ya rabotayu za rubezhom vrachom. Mne nuzhna tvoya pomoshch, perevedi 15000 rubley, ya zastyal v aeroportu. Klyanus, vernu vse s protsentami.
Sluzhba podderzhki Gosuslugi: obnaruzhena popytka vzloma vashego akkaunta. Dlya zashchity dannykh soobshchite nam kod iz SMS i parol ot lichnogo kabineta.
WORK FROM HOME OPPORTUNITY! Earn $5000/week with just 2 hours a day! No experience needed. Just pay $99 registration fee to get your starter kit. Limited positions available!
Hi grandma, it is me, Jake. I am in trouble. I got into a car accident and need $2000 for bail. Please do not tell mom. Send it through Zelle right away.
Hi, I found your number online. I am offering a special deal on car insurance. Rates 50% below market. Just need your driver license number and SSN to get started.
Your subscription will renew for $299 tomorrow. To cancel, call 1-888-XXX-XXXX immediately. This is your final notice. Failure to call will result in automatic charge.
Send 0.1 BTC to this address and receive 1 BTC back! Elon Musk is doing a crypto giveaway. This offer expires in 10 minutes. Address: bc1qXXXXXX
Tinkoff: Vy sovershili perevod 47900 rub. Esli eto byli ne vy, pozvonite 8-800-XXX-XXXX i nazovite kod 9412 dlya otmeny operatsii.
Your Amazon order #123-456 has shipped. Track your package at amazon.com/orders. Delivery expected June 5.
Hi, can we reschedule our meeting from Tuesday to Wednesday at 2pm? Let me know if that works for you.
Your bank statement for June is ready. Log in to your account at chase.com to view it. No action is required.
Privet! Napominayu o vstreche zavtra v 15:00 v kafe. Esli chto-to izmenitsya, napishi.
Vash zakaz v magazine Wildberries otpravlen. Ozhidaemaya data dostavki: 6 iyunya. Otsledit: wb.ru/orders
Reminder: your dentist appointment is scheduled for June 10 at 10:30 AM. Call us at (555) 123-4567 to reschedule.
